clips.title: Rooftop Ronin
clips.prompt: Anime style, bold clean linework, cel shading, vibrant saturated color, expressive. Night. A high rooftop above a sprawling city of glowing signs, a water tower and antennae, distant airships. A person in a flowing coat stands at the edge, coat and hair whipping in the wind, as the camera pushes in. Falling rain begins, a glowing skyline behind. Cool blue night with warm sign glow. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Dynamic anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rain Cafe
clips.prompt: Soft watercolor painting style, translucent washes, bleeding colors, visible paper texture, loose delicate edges. Evening, rainy. A narrow old-town alley with a small glowing cafe, wet cobblestones reflecting warm light, a striped awning. A person in a light coat pauses under the awning holding a warm cup, watching the rain, as the camera pushes gently in. An umbrella, blurred lantern light, ripples in a puddle. Soft warm glow bleeding into cool rain. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Delicate watercolor aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Airlock
clips.prompt: Polished 3D CGI animation style, smooth rendered surfaces, soft global illumination, subtle depth of field. A sleek spaceship corridor with glowing panels, ribbed walls, a large round airlock door ahead, floor lighting. A person in a fitted flight suit walks toward the airlock, gloved hand rising to a control, as the camera pushes in behind them. Blinking indicators, drifting vapor, reflective floor. Cool blue with warm accents. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Rendered 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Neon Alley
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, high-contrast neon, rain-slicked reflections, dense futuristic detail, cinematic. Night. A cramped future-city alley drenched in pink and cyan neon, hanging signs in unknown scripts, steam vents, tangled cables, puddles mirroring the glow. A person in a sleek techwear jacket strides through the alley, collar up, as the camera pushes in. Flickering holograms, a passing drone, drifting steam. Saturated neon against wet dark. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Gritty cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Kitchen Chaos
clips.prompt: Cartoon style, bold outlines, bright flat colors, squash-and-stretch, playful exaggeration. Day. A wacky cartoon kitchen with a teetering tower of dishes, a bubbling pot, flour clouds in the air, googly-eyed utensils. A person in a big apron and chef's hat frantically stirs a pot as it puffs steam, wide-eyed, as the camera pushes in. Flying bubbles, a wobbling cake, a startled cartoon cat. Bright cheerful light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Zany cartoon aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Landing
clips.prompt: Comic book style, bold ink outlines, halftone shading, dynamic saturated color, action-panel energy. Day. A city street of tall buildings, cracked pavement, scattered newspapers, motion lines in the air. A person in a heroic caped outfit lands in a crouch on the street, one fist down, cape settling, as the camera pushes in. A shockwave of dust, awed bystanders, a glinting skyline. Bright dramatic light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Explosive comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Dungeon
clips.prompt: Retro pixel art style, blocky pixels, limited color palette, 16-bit game aesthetic, dithering, crisp pixel edges. A torchlit pixel dungeon, brick walls, chains, a treasure chest, flickering pixel torches. A person rendered in pixel art raises a torch and steps forward cautiously, as the camera pushes in. Pixel cobwebs, a skull, glowing embers, a rat. Warm torch glow against dark stone. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Moody pixel-art aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Tinkerer
clips.prompt: Stop-motion claymation style, molded clay figures, visible fingerprint texture, handmade plasticine, tactile. Day. A cluttered clay workshop, clay tools on a pegboard, a clay workbench, little clay gears and springs. A person made of clay tightens a bolt on a wobbly clay contraption, tongue out in concentration, as the camera pushes in. A clay wrench, a clay lamp, a clay mouse. Warm soft studio light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Charming claymation aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Meadow
clips.prompt: Soft hand-painted animation style, lush painterly backgrounds, gentle colors, whimsical and warm. Day. A vast green hillside meadow under a big blue sky with soft clouds, wildflowers swaying, a lone tree, a distant village. A person in a simple dress or shirt runs through the tall grass with arms out, joyful, as the camera pushes in. Drifting seeds, butterflies, a gust bending the grass. Warm golden daylight. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Whimsical hand-painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Study
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, sketchbook, mostly monochrome. Day. A quiet artist's studio sketched loosely, an easel, a draped cloth, a stool, hatched shadows. A person in casual clothes stands at the easel drawing intently, glancing toward us, as the camera pushes in. Sketched jars of brushes, a plant, paper on the floor. Soft graphite shading, paper-white highlights. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Gestural pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cliff's Edge
clips.prompt: Digital painting style, painterly, visible brushstrokes, rich blended color, concept-art illustration. Sunset. A dramatic seaside cliff at golden hour, crashing waves far below, a fiery painted sky, wildflowers on the ledge. A person in a flowing coat stands near the edge facing the sea, coat streaming, then turns as the camera pushes in. Sea spray, distant sails, soaring birds. Warm sunset glow. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Sweeping painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Vendor
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic style, ultra-sharp detail, lifelike skin and textures, natural light, photographic depth. Day. A bustling covered market, crates of glistening produce, hanging herbs, dust in shafts of light. A person in an apron arranges fruit at a stall, mid-gesture, calling out warmly, as the camera pushes in. Weathered crates, a brass scale, a passing shopper. Warm natural daylight. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Crisp hyperrealistic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Office
clips.prompt: Film noir style, high-contrast black and white, deep shadows, venetian-blind light, moody. Night. A shadowy detective's office, a desk with a lamp, a spinning ceiling fan, blinds slicing light across the wall, rain on the window. A person in a trench coat and hat leans over the desk studying a photo, brim low, as the camera pushes in. A ringing phone, a glass, smoke curling. Hard chiaroscuro light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Classic noir aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Incantation
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy style, painterly cinematic realism, rich color, dramatic magical light. Night. A vast ancient stone hall, towering carved pillars, floating candles, glowing runes on the floor, drifting embers. A person in ornate robes raises a hand as glowing energy gathers in their palm, as the camera pushes in. Swirling magic, tattered banners, a shaft of moonlight. Warm magical glow against cool stone. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Grand fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Bridge
clips.prompt: Cinematic sci-fi realism, photoreal, sleek production design, atmospheric lighting. A futuristic starship bridge, a wide viewport of stars and a distant planet, glowing consoles, holographic displays. A person in a fitted command uniform stands at the center console watching the viewport, hand on a rail, as the camera pushes in. Blinking readouts, a drifting hologram, crew silhouettes. Cool blue console glow with starlight. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Epic sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.
